step1.heading: Enter Device QR Code
step1.description: Type or scan the QR code printed on the back of this device.

step2.heading: Select Your Table
step2.description: Choose the table this device is placed on.

errors.qr_not_found: QR code not found. Check the code and try again.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
